summary: Completed comprehensive testing of dynamic Edit Order vs Browse Menu button logic for restaurant 478. All core functionality works correctly including API integration, button logic, and navigation.
passed_tests: Landing Page loads correctly for restaurant 478 ('Welcome to 18march!')
checkTableStatus API service function exists and is called correctly
API integration works - verified network requests to https://preprod.mygenie.online/api/v1/customer/check-table-status
Dynamic button logic functions correctly - shows Browse Menu for available tables
Table badge displays correctly when table_id and table_no parameters are present
Browse Menu button navigation works - successfully routes to /478/menu
isMultipleMenu logic works - restaurant 716/739 skip table status checking
OrderSuccess page properly redirects when no order data is present
Error handling works - shows 'Invalid table' toast for invalid table IDs
Loading state displays while checking table status
